issues.title: ND option processing has an arbitrary 10-option cap

evidence.code: VNET_DEFINE_STATIC(int, nd6_maxndopt) = 10; and nd6_options stops when i > V_nd6_maxndopt.
evidence.spec: Valid Neighbor Discovery options in Router Advertisements must be processed without an arbitrary small count limit.

issues.title: Proxy Neighbor Advertisement random delay is explicitly not implemented

evidence.code: Comments list the proxy advertisement delay rule as not implemented.
evidence.spec: Proxy or anycast Neighbor Advertisements should use a bounded random response delay.

issues.title: Proxy Neighbor Discovery lacks unsolicited Neighbor Advertisement support

evidence.code: Proxy NA is sent from solicitation-response paths; no proactive proxy-state unsolicited NA path is present.
evidence.spec: Unsolicited Neighbor Advertisements may be sent to update neighbor caches.

issues.title: IPv6 fragment helper checks only the base header immediate protocol

evidence.code: rte_ipv6_frag_get_ipv6_fragment_header returns a fragment header only when hdr->proto == IPPROTO_FRAGMENT.
evidence.spec: IPv6 extension headers form a Next Header chain; fragment handling must account for preceding extension headers.

issues.title: DHCPv6 implementation is absent from the reduced repository

evidence.code: No DHCPv6 or DHCP6 client/server/relay/message-processing implementation is present in the reduced source tree.
evidence.spec: RFC 8415 defines DHCPv6 support obligations for DHCPv6-capable IPv6 configuration.

issues.title: MLD multicast receive path can be diverted before IPv6 stack handling

evidence.code: KNI filtering and enqueue decisions can route packets away from ff_veth_input, the IPv6 stack input path.
evidence.spec: MLD ICMPv6 multicast listener packets must reach IPv6/ICMPv6 MLD handling.
